prompts: Masterpiece, 8k photorealistic full body fashion flat-lay. The subject is standing in a confident upright pose wearing: tailored bright green blazer, silk green camisole, wide-leg green trousers, chunky white sneakers. Die-cut sticker cutout style: crisp white paper border with fiber texture, subtle 3D beveled edge, micro drop-shadows. Top-down flat-lay composition on soft mint-green seamless background with thin stack of 3-4 premium white paper sheets. Prominent oversized silver trombone paperclip at top-left corner with metallic reflections and micro-scratches. 4 elegant hand-drawn cursive black ink arrows with labels: 'Tailored Green Blazer', 'Silk Camisole', 'Wide-Leg Trousers', 'Chunky Kicks'. Ray-traced ambient occlusion and soft shadows between paper layers. High-end editorial studio lighting. Full-color photography, no illustration.

Ray-traced soft shadows. Editorial studio lighting. Full-color photography.

High-fashion editorial typography poster, 8k photorealistic, portrait orientation. Strict left-third / right-two-thirds composition: right two-thirds = subject against solid forest-green background, arms crossed, intense editorial gaze, upper-body shot. Subject is fully contained within the right two-thirds area — no cropping or breaking of the frame boundary. Left one-third = massive ultra-bold vertical sans-serif text 'VOGUE' perfectly full-bleed touching absolute top and absolute bottom edges with zero padding, acting as stencil mask revealing the subject through the letters, far-left space beyond the letters is solid crisp white. Top-right corner: small text 'DEFINING MODERN ELEGANCE & TIMELESS STYLE' in white Helvetica Condensed with wide letter-spacing. Strict monochromatic forest-green palette sharply contrasted by crisp white. Sharp studio lighting, high contrast, clean premium graphic design aesthetic.

High-fashion editorial typography poster, 8k photorealistic, portrait orientation. Strict left-third / right-two-thirds composition: right two-thirds = subject against solid deep crimson-red background, bold pose with one hand raised near face, upper-body shot. Subject is fully contained within the right two-thirds — no cropping or frame-breaking. Left one-third = massive ultra-bold vertical sans-serif text 'ICON' perfectly full-bleed touching absolute top and bottom edges with zero padding, stencil mask effect, far-left space is solid crisp white. Top-right corner: small text 'BREAKING THE BOUNDARIES OF STYLE' in white Helvetica Condensed with wide letter-spacing. Strict monochromatic deep crimson-red palette with crisp white contrast. Sharp studio lighting, high contrast, clean graphic design.

Photorealistic high-fashion upper-body portrait with an Instagram pop-out frame. Solid coral-red background. White Instagram-style post frame perfectly centered: very thin top, left, and right borders; thicker white bottom panel with red heart icon, comment bubble, share icon, bookmark icon, bold text '845,200 likes', username 'SeoulFitStyle', caption 'Sending love your way! 💋... more', 'View all comments'. Controlled Kiss Pop-Out 3D effect: body leans slightly toward camera, head stays securely and completely WITHIN the thin top white border, right hand raised near mouth in a blowing-kiss gesture extends just past the frame edge in a natural gesture, left hand rests on the frame edge. The entire composition looks physically stable, balanced, and grounded — no jarring or unstable visual effects. Realistic 3D drop shadows enhance depth naturally. Professional studio lighting, commercial photography, 8k.

Photorealistic high-fashion upper-body portrait with an Instagram pop-out frame. Solid warm golden-yellow background. White Instagram-style post frame perfectly centered: very thin top, left, and right borders; thicker white bottom panel with red heart icon, comment bubble, share icon, bookmark icon, bold text '88,000 likes', username 'SeoulFitStyle_', caption 'Framing the perfect moment! 🌟📸... more', 'View all comments'. Controlled Dynamic Frame 3D effect: head and upper body remain securely WITHIN the frame boundaries, both arms extend naturally outward past the side borders, both hands form L-shapes as if framing a scene, creating spatial depth with hands closer to camera. The composition looks physically stable, balanced, and well-grounded — the pop-out elements are elegantly controlled. Realistic 3D drop shadows. Studio lighting, 8k.

Photorealistic high-fashion upper-body portrait with an Instagram pop-out frame. Solid teal-turquoise background. White Instagram-style post frame perfectly centered: very thin top, left, and right borders; thicker white bottom panel with red heart icon, comment bubble, share icon, bookmark icon, bold text '1,240,500 likes', username 'SeoulFitStyle', caption 'Feeling dazzling in turquoise! 💠✨... more', 'View all comments'. Controlled Resting Pop-Out 3D effect: head and shoulders gently rise just above the top thin border, both hands rest casually and naturally on the thick bottom white UI panel. The composition looks physically stable, balanced, and elegant — a natural resting pose on the frame. Gentle warm direct gaze at camera. Realistic drop shadows. Studio lighting, 8k.

Photorealistic high-fashion upper-body portrait with an Instagram pop-out frame. Solid bubblegum-pink background. White Instagram-style post frame perfectly centered: very thin top, left, and right borders; thicker white bottom panel with red heart icon, comment bubble, share icon, bookmark icon, bold text '1,560 likes', username 'SeoulFitStyle', caption 'PRETTY IN PINK... more', 'View all comments'. Controlled Grip Pop-Out 3D effect: head rises naturally just above the top border, both hands grip the outer edges of the thin side frame borders in a balanced, natural hold. The composition looks physically stable, well-balanced, and visually grounded — no jarring or unstable elements. Playful confident expression. Realistic drop shadows. Studio lighting, 8k.

Hyper-realistic high-fashion editorial photo inside a surreal 3D geometric color box room — a hollow cube interior with bold cobalt-blue walls, floor, and ceiling filling the entire frame. Full-body shot, subject wearing avant-garde fashion (clean silhouette, stylish layering, outfit contrasts with blue walls). Dynamic gravity-defying pose: leaning sideways against the wall with one leg extended outward. Confident cool expression, direct camera gaze. Wide-angle 24mm lens, strong geometric perspective, slightly tilted horizon. Cinematic studio lighting: crisp key light, controlled shadows, subtle rim light, realistic blue bounce reflections from the colored walls. Ultra-detailed skin texture, natural pores, realistic fabric weave. Subject centered with strong geometric lines. Photorealistic, 8k, editorial campaign quality.

Hyper-realistic high-fashion editorial photo inside a surreal 3D geometric color box room — a hollow cube interior with vivid magenta-pink walls, floor, and ceiling filling the entire frame. Full-body shot, subject wearing avant-garde fashion (contrasting outfit). Dynamic pose: dramatic sideways mid-leap with arms spread. Big cute bright smile, joyful playful happy expression. Wide-angle 28mm lens, strong geometric perspective. Cinematic studio lighting with realistic magenta reflections and bounce light. Ultra-detailed skin texture and fabric weave. Subject centered. Photorealistic, 8k, editorial campaign quality.

Hyper-realistic high-fashion editorial photo inside a surreal 3D geometric color box room — a hollow cube interior with vivid emerald-green walls, floor, and ceiling filling the entire frame. Full-body shot, subject wearing modern editorial fashion (contrasting outfit). Dynamic gravity-defying pose: bracing sideways against the green wall, hands and feet pushing against the walls. Surprised cute wide-eyed expression with mouth slightly open in delight. Wide-angle 24mm lens, tilted horizon, strong perspective. Cinematic studio lighting with emerald green bounce light. Ultra-detailed textures. Photorealistic, 8k, editorial quality.

Hyper-realistic high-fashion editorial photo inside a surreal 3D geometric color box room — a hollow cube interior with warm vivid orange walls, floor, and ceiling filling the entire frame. Full-body shot, subject wearing editorial fashion (contrasting outfit, clean silhouette). Dynamic pose: athletic upward leap with legs bent mid-air. Playful winking expression with cute smirk, one eye closed. Wide-angle 35mm lens, strong geometric composition with negative space. Cinematic studio lighting with warm orange bounce light and realistic shadows. Ultra-detailed skin and fabric texture. Photorealistic, 8k, editorial campaign quality.

Ultra-realistic photo composite, 8k commercial photography. Subject standing on a solid golden-yellow floor, both hands gripping the left and right outer edges of a white Instagram post frame prop. Upper body and head remain inside and just above the frame — the frame is held stably in front of the body. The composition looks physically balanced and well-grounded. Extreme high top-down overhead camera angle. Strong 10mm ultra-wide fisheye distortion applied ONLY to the person (exaggeratedly large head, smaller body tapering downward), while the Instagram frame prop remains geometrically straight and undistorted. Confident upward gaze directly into the camera. Outfit: vivid purple graffiti-print puffer jacket, black tee, layered gold chain necklaces, clean white sneakers, square black sunglasses, black baseball cap. Clean Instagram UI overlaid on the white frame: username 'seoulfit' with blue verified checkmark, red heart icon, comment bubble, share icon, bookmark icon. Photorealistic.

Ultra-realistic photo composite, 8k commercial photography. Subject standing on a solid golden-yellow floor, both hands gripping the outer edges of a white Instagram post frame. Frame held stably, composition balanced and grounded. Extreme high top-down overhead angle. Strong 10mm fisheye distortion on person only, frame stays straight. Big bright cute smile, eyes crinkled with joy, happy expression looking up at camera. Outfit: vivid purple graffiti-print puffer jacket, black tee, layered gold chains, white sneakers, black baseball cap (no sunglasses, full smile visible). Clean Instagram UI on frame: username 'seoulfit', verified checkmark, heart/comment/share icons.

Ultra-realistic photo composite, 8k commercial photography. Subject standing on golden-yellow floor, both hands gripping outer edges of white Instagram frame. Stable balanced composition, frame straight. Extreme high top-down overhead angle. Strong 10mm fisheye distortion on person only. Playful winking expression: one eye confidently closed, cute smirk. Square black sunglasses slightly pushed down nose to reveal the wink. Outfit: vivid purple graffiti-print puffer jacket, black tee, layered gold chains, white sneakers, black baseball cap. Instagram UI on frame: username 'seoulfit'.

Ultra-realistic photo composite, 8k commercial photography. Subject standing on golden-yellow floor, both hands gripping outer edges of white Instagram frame. Stable balanced grounded composition. Extreme high top-down overhead angle. Strong 10mm fisheye distortion on person only. Surprised excited expression: wide open eyes, mouth open in delighted surprise, looking upward. Outfit: vivid purple graffiti-print puffer jacket, black tee, layered gold chains, white sneakers, black baseball cap. Instagram UI on frame: username 'seoulfit', verified checkmark, icons.

Extreme close-up intimate portrait, 85mm f/1.4, razor-thin depth of field. Subject's face fills 80% of the frame, captured while lying on a soft surface. Face in three-quarter profile, eyes open but gazing away toward the upper-left corner — unfocused, contemplative, lost in thought, NOT looking at camera. Lips very slightly parted with a subtle glass-like glossy sheen catching a warm highlight on the lower lip. Short hair sleep-tousled, several strands falling across the forehead. Dual color temperature lighting: warm amber-gold key light from front-right illuminating cheek, nose bridge, and lips; cool blue-grey ambient fill from left, making hair appear indigo-black in shadow. Soft fur or fuzzy textile in warm beige-mauve tones, completely out of focus, as a foreground bokeh layer occupying the bottom 20% of frame. Dark indistinct cool fabric background. ETERNA cinematic color grade: desaturated base, warm amber skin highlights, cool indigo shadows, visible medium film grain, soft halation on warm highlights. No flash, no studio light. Photorealistic, 8k.

Extreme close-up intimate portrait, 85mm f/1.4, razor-thin depth of field. Subject's face fills 80% of frame while lying on a soft surface. Eyes gently closed, expression completely serene and peaceful — the face of someone drifting into sleep or lost in a private reverie. Lips softly closed, traces of relaxation at the corners. Short hair tousled, strands on forehead. Dual color temperature: warm amber-gold key from front-right glowing on cheek and nose; cool blue-grey ambient from left turning hair indigo-black. Soft fur foreground in warm beige-mauve completely out-of-focus at bottom 20%. Dark cool fabric background. ETERNA cinematic grade: desaturated, visible film grain, dreamy halation on warm highlights, warm amber skin, cool indigo shadows. Photorealistic, 8k.

Extreme close-up intimate portrait, 85mm f/1.4, razor-thin depth of field. Subject's face fills 80% of frame while lying on a soft surface. Eyes open, looking directly into the camera with quiet intensity — soft, intimate, a look of being seen, of closeness. Not confrontational, just honest and still. Lips very slightly parted. Short hair tousled. Dual color temperature: warm amber-gold key from front-right, cool blue-grey ambient fill. Soft fur foreground in warm beige-mauve at bottom 20%. Dark cool fabric background. ETERNA cinematic grade: visible film grain, warm amber skin, indigo shadow tones, halation. Photorealistic, 8k.

Extreme close-up intimate portrait, 85mm f/1.4, razor-thin depth of field. Subject's face fills 80% of frame while lying on a soft surface. A very slight soft smile on the lips — not a full smile, the ghost of one, a quiet private happiness. Eyes half-lidded, dreamy and warm, gaze drifting softly downward as if remembering something beautiful. Short hair tousled. Dual color temperature: warm amber-gold key from front-right, cool blue-grey ambient fill. Soft fur foreground in warm beige-mauve at bottom 20%. Dark cool fabric background. ETERNA cinematic grade: visible film grain, warm amber skin highlights, cool indigo shadows, dreamy halation. Photorealistic, 8k.

High-angle architectural fashion editorial, 24mm wide-angle, f/3.5, photorealistic 8k. Subject seated on a grand wide white Carrara marble staircase. Head tilted back, eyes gently closed, face serene and receiving soft natural light from an overhead skylight — lips relaxed and slightly parted. Legs fully extended diagonally downward toward the camera along the marble steps — legs dominate the bottom 60% of the frame due to wide-angle perspective distortion. One ankle crossed over the other. Subject wearing: knee-high black leather riding boots with silver buckle detail (from thigh to toe in full view), black sleeveless shift dress with white ornamental print, silver watch on wrist. Shot from top of staircase looking down at 45-degree angle. White-gray Carrara marble with subtle grey veining fills entire frame — no walls, no railings. Soft overhead skylight illumination. PRO Neg Hi color grade: commercial clarity, cool neutral tones, controlled contrast, deep black leather against pale marble. No persons other than the subject.

High-angle architectural fashion editorial, 24mm wide-angle, f/3.5, photorealistic 8k. Subject seated on grand white Carrara marble staircase, leaning back on hands. Head level, eyes looking directly up at the camera with a confident, self-possessed editorial gaze. Composed expression. Legs fully extended along marble steps toward camera, boots prominent and large in foreground due to wide-angle lens. Knee-high black leather riding boots, silver buckle, black sleeveless dress with ornamental print, silver watch. High angle from top of staircase. White-gray marble veining fills frame. Soft overhead skylight. PRO Neg Hi grade: commercial clarity, cool neutral, deep black leather vs pale marble.

High-angle architectural fashion editorial, 24mm wide-angle, f/3.5, photorealistic 8k. Subject seated on grand white Carrara marble staircase, head turned slightly to the side — a natural, contemplative profile gaze directed along the staircase landing. Clean elegant profile, relaxed. Legs extended along stairs toward camera, boots prominent. Knee-high black riding boots, silver buckle, black sleeveless dress, silver watch. High angle from top of staircase. White-gray marble fills entire frame. Soft skylight overhead. PRO Neg Hi grade: controlled contrast, cool tones, crisp commercial editorial.

High-angle architectural fashion editorial, 24mm wide-angle, f/3.5, photorealistic 8k. Subject seated on grand white Carrara marble staircase, leaning back comfortably, a very slight natural warm smile — poised and contained. Chin slightly down, eyes relaxed and open looking gently upward. Legs extended along stairs toward camera, boots dominant in frame. Knee-high black riding boots, silver buckle, black sleeveless dress, silver watch. High angle from top of staircase. White-gray Carrara marble fills entire frame. Soft overhead skylight. PRO Neg Hi grade: commercial clarity, neutral-cool, boot leather deep black against pale marble.

Extreme close-up beauty portrait, 105mm f/2.5, photorealistic 8k. Subject's face centered, filling most of the frame. Gaze directed upward to the upper-left — dreamy, not looking at camera, contemplative. Right hand raised to lips, fingers elegantly pinching the stem of a single dark red cherry by index and middle finger, the cherry just touching the slightly parted lips. Lips glossy with moisture. Slender fingers with short nude matte manicure, visible natural finger details. Pure white seamless infinity backdrop. 360-degree wrap-around beauty lighting — completely shadowless, even illumination, face glowing from within. Ring light catchlight visible in pupils. ASTIA color grade: ultra-soft skin tones, low contrast, creamy midtones, globally desaturated EXCEPT the cherry which is the only vivid saturated element (deep burgundy-red). Photorealistic, 8k.

Extreme close-up beauty portrait, 105mm f/2.5, photorealistic 8k. Subject's face centered, filling frame. Looking directly and softly at the camera with open, warm gaze — engaging, slightly playful. Right hand raised near cheek/jaw, fingers holding a dark red cherry by its stem, displayed beside the face as a saturated accent. Lips lightly closed with a trace of a soft smile. Short nude manicure. Pure white seamless backdrop. 360-degree shadowless beauty lighting, lit-from-within glow, ring light catchlight. ASTIA grade: soft creamy skin, low contrast, only the cherry saturated in deep burgundy-red. Photorealistic, 8k.

Extreme close-up beauty portrait, 105mm f/2.5, photorealistic 8k. Subject's face fills frame. Eyes half-lidded, languid and dreamy — heavy lashes, gaze softly downward, quiet allure. Lips gently parted, the deep red cherry touching the center of the lower lip held by elegant fingers. Short nude manicure. Pure white seamless backdrop. 360-degree shadowless beauty lighting, no shadows, glowing skin. ASTIA grade: ultra-soft skin, low contrast, creamy whites, cherry the single vivid saturated element in deep burgundy-red. Photorealistic, 8k.

Extreme close-up beauty portrait, 105mm f/2.5, photorealistic 8k. Subject's face fills frame. Bright genuine playful smile — natural and light, a hint of warmth. Eyes open with a warm sparkle, direct but friendly gaze at camera. Right hand holding a dark red cherry by its stem in front of the chin as a playful prop. Short nude manicure. Pure white seamless backdrop. 360-degree shadowless beauty lighting, pure even glow. ASTIA grade: soft creamy skin, low contrast, globally desaturated except the cherry — deep vivid burgundy-red as the single color accent. Photorealistic, 8k.

High-fashion editorial, minimalist surrealism, photorealistic 8k. Full-body shot of the subject leaning casually yet powerfully against a massive oversized leather boot sculpture — the boot towers approximately 3 times the subject's height, crafted in smooth emerald green leather with cream-white sole, dramatically scaled. Subject stands beside the boot, one shoulder leaning against its side, body angled with relaxed confidence. Expression: cool, assured, direct editorial gaze at camera. Outfit: emerald green fitted sleeveless crop top, matching green leather pants, knee-high green leather boots, small structured green handbag held in one hand. Pure white seamless studio backdrop. Glossy white reflective floor with subtle reflection. Soft even studio lighting: premium editorial shadows. 85mm lens, eye-level camera angle. Ultra-high resolution, magazine-ready. Monochromatic emerald green theme with neutral white background.

High-fashion editorial, minimalist surrealism, photorealistic 8k. Full-body shot of subject leaning casually against a massive oversized leather boot sculpture (approximately 3x their height) in rich deep burgundy-red leather with cream sole. Subject beside the boot, one shoulder resting against it. Expression: playful light smile, charming and relaxed. Outfit: deep burgundy-red fitted sleeveless crop top, matching leather pants, knee-high burgundy boots, small structured handbag in matching color. Pure white seamless studio backdrop. Glossy white reflective floor. Soft even studio lighting. 85mm lens, eye-level. Ultra-high resolution. Monochromatic deep burgundy-red theme.

High-fashion editorial, minimalist surrealism, photorealistic 8k. Full-body shot of subject leaning against a massive oversized leather boot sculpture (approximately 3x their height) in matte jet-black leather with cream sole. Soft-focus cinematic portrait with intentional artistic motion blur. Subject's face partially blurred and ghosted with flowing hair captured mid-sway, creating a dreamy ethereal motion effect. Expression: serene and distant, slightly parted lips, eyes softly open gazing gently to the side — not looking at camera, lost in an inner moment. Frame bathed in golden beige and warm sepia tones. Natural diffused window light from the side, warm glow on skin, illuminating dancing strands of hair across the frame. 85mm f/1.2, slow shutter 1/8s with intentional handheld motion. Very soft focus, shallow depth of field isolating subject from pale creamy background. Cinematic warm LUT: amber shadows, cream highlights. Subtle fine film grain. Vintage editorial, analog dream sequence aesthetic. 4K, no harsh contrasts, smooth gradients.

Soft-focus cinematic portrait with intentional artistic motion blur. Subject's face blurred and ghosted with hair mid-sway. Expression: eyes gently closed, lips slightly parted — absolute peace, surrendering to the moment, completely at rest within movement. Golden beige and warm sepia atmosphere. Natural soft window light, warm amber glow on skin, backlit strands of hair. 85mm f/1.2, 1/8s slow shutter, handheld. Ultra-shallow DOF, dreamy soft focus. Cinematic warm grade: amber shadows, cream highlights. Visible fine film grain. Ethereal, analog, painterly. 4K, no harsh contrasts.

Soft-focus cinematic portrait with gentle intentional motion blur. Subject's face softly blurred and ghosted with hair in gentle sway. Expression: the very beginning of a soft dreamy smile — barely-there, almost imagined, lips curved the slightest amount in private happiness. Eyes softly open, dreamy gaze into the near distance. Golden beige and warm sepia atmosphere. Soft natural window light. 85mm f/1.2, 1/8s slow shutter, handheld. Dreamy cinematic grade: warm amber shadows, cream highlights, visible fine grain. Ethereal, nostalgic, painterly. 4K, smooth gradients.

Soft-focus cinematic portrait with intentional motion blur. Subject's face blurred and ghosted with hair mid-sway. Expression: eyes softly open, looking gently and directly toward the camera through the motion — not a hard stare, a hazy fog-of-morning awareness acknowledging the viewer through the dreamlike blur. Lips barely parted. Golden beige and warm sepia atmosphere. Soft window light, warm glow. 85mm f/1.2, 1/8s slow shutter, handheld motion. Dreamy soft focus, shallow DOF. Cinematic warm LUT: amber shadows, cream highlights, film grain. Ethereal, analog, poetic. 4K.
